# OpenType fixture provenance

`stix-two-math.woff2` is a WOFF2 encoding of `STIXTwoMath-Regular.ttf` from
google/fonts commit `389b770410cc0b7c21c85673bfa2077420fe7f65`. The source TTF
SHA-256 is `562551b15b836e6e01d1b7350909baf3c8c8d83260c1190fbf4544333e6936de`.
It was encoded without subsetting by fontTools 4.63.0; the committed WOFF2
SHA-256 is `cb1149b7c8b7b194eff7f42e20cf9e7a9706d342ffc2b14765624577d8be38e3`.
The adjacent license file is the upstream SIL Open Font License text.
